subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Thee, O my God, inasmuch as Thou hast aided Thy servants and handmaidens to make mention of Thee and glorify Thee, and to serve Thy Cause. I beseech Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا الهی بما ایدت عبادک و امائک علی ذکرک و ثنائک و خدمه امرک اسئلک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
